overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a peaceful walk through a Los Santos waterfront area during golden hour. The player moves from a residential courtyard past palm trees along a canal walkway, passing wooden docks with the downtown skyline visible in the distance. Wet pavement suggests recent rain as the sun sets behind the skyscrapers.

events.description: turning left from building courtyard onto the waterfront pathway
completing left turn to face the waterfront and city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet grass and pavement beside the apartment building, then turning left toward the waterfront promenade

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with red tile roof and balconies
row of tall palm trees lining the path
distant skyscrapers visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a residential courtyard with a white apartment building and palm trees. The camera walks forward across wet grass and pavement, then turns left onto a waterfront path, revealing the distant downtown skyline through the golden hour light.

events.description: approaching the canal edge where water becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete waterfront path with the city skyline ahead

entered.detail: calm waterway reflecting the cloudy sky
vintage black payphone booth on the sidewalk
ornate green street lamp with dual lanterns

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open waterfront promenade, the canal water comes into view on the left. The path features vintage street lamps and a payphone, with the downtown skyline growing larger ahead and palm trees now lining the right side.

events.description: pedestrian walking in opposite direction passes by the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the canal path passing benches and street furniture

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera in the opposite direction wearing a gray jacket and red cap

entered.detail: wooden piers extending into the canal water
blue slatted park bench facing the water

segments.scene_description: The walkway narrows between the canal and buildings, with wooden docks visible in the water. A pedestrian passes by walking in the opposite direction. Blue park benches line the right side of the path.

events.description: stepping onto the wooden dock structures extending over the water
panning camera to look across the water at the opposite bank

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden docks and looking around at the water and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: circular modern apartment complex with multiple balconies
elevated highway or train bridge spanning the canal
white-topped wooden posts marking the dock edges

segments.scene_description: Moving onto the wooden dock planks extending over the canal water, the camera explores the marina area. Round apartment buildings and an overpass bridge become visible across the water as the camera pans to take in the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of marina pier with panoramic city view

events.description: sun glare increases as camera faces the setting sun behind the skyscrapers
turning to view the opposite bank and the end of the dock area

agents.ego_description: standing on the end of the dock looking out at the water and the downtown skyline backlit by the setting sun

entered.detail: tall tower visible on the horizon to the right
low building with red roof structure across the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment reaches the end of the wooden dock, offering a panoramic view of the downtown skyline silhouetted against the golden hour sun. The camera turns to show the ferry terminal and round apartment buildings across the water, with the sun creating a warm glare as it sets behind the skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet residential courtyard toward a panoramic vista of the downtown skyline during the golden hour. It begins by moving across wet grass and pavement beside a white apartment building before turning left onto a waterfront path where the distant city silhouette first appears. As the camera advances along the promenade, the scene opens up to reveal a canal on the left and vintage street lamps on the right, eventually narrowing as it passes blue park benches and a pedestrian. The path then shifts from pavement to wooden dock planks extending over the marina, bringing round apartment buildings and an overpass bridge into view. Finally, the camera reaches the end of the dock to capture a wide view of the skyscrapers silhouetted against the setting sun, with a warm glare reflecting off the water near the ferry terminal.
